title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Indiabulls Real Estate

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Indiabulls Real Estate
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Indiabulls Real Estate in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Indiabulls Real Estate:
Indiabulls Real Estate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indiabulls Real Estate!
